title: About Gendo and Yuis college degrees profession
display_title: About Gendo and Yuis college degrees profession
wikitext:
[]: About Gendo and Yui's college degrees/profession?             Quote Post by Kaworu-chan » Tue Jan 05, 2010 10:37 pm I'm wondering what kind of college degrees that Shinji's parents hold? I'm thinking Yui might have a doctoral degree but I'm not too sure about Gendo. What do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Jan 05, 2010 10:43 pm A bit of relevant info may be found here: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Classified_Information_%28Translation%29#Yui_Ikari

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Jan 05, 2010 11:09 pm Fuyutsuki must have at least a doctorate in metaphysical biology, unless he founded the field himself. Yui probably has a degree of that level. Gendo... well, he's not exactly the opposite of an enigma.

[]: Re: About Gendo and Yui...?             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Wed Jan 06, 2010 7:43 pm Kaworu-chan wrote: I'm wondering what kind of college degrees that Shinji's parents hold? I'm thinking Yui might have a doctoral degree but I'm not too sure about Gendo. What do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Jan 06, 2010 7:47 pm Yui and Gendo are most likely experts in "Metaphysical Biology", or whatever the field Fuyutsuki was in was called. The two are likely either his former students or university associates. Whatever they all studied, it evidently related to most of the incomprehensible Eva, Angel and Third Impact physics that came later.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 06, 2010 8:12 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The two are likely either his former students or university associates.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Thu Jan 07, 2010 10:25 am The Eva Monkey wrote: But my humorous response is that Gendo would have majored in "Public Relations".

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Thu Jan 07, 2010 3:06 pm I remember reading that Yui went to Fuyutsuki's Metaphysical Biology office a lot, even though it had nothing to do with what she was officially studying at the time. I don't remember where I read this, but I'm pretty sure it was on evageeks.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Pointy » Fri Jan 08, 2010 6:00 am Gendo has one of those Arts/Sociology degrees, because it was easy and didn't take too much time away from his bucket bonging.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 08, 2010 3:10 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: So logically, all three of them would have degrees in (meta-physical) biology/genetics.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Jan 08, 2010 5:17 pm Reichu wrote: He probably majored in economics or something (CI says he served as an auditor for the KatsExp).

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Fri Jan 08, 2010 6:03 pm I reckon that Gendo majored in the Psychology of Relationships.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 08, 2010 7:56 pm Allemann wrote: Then what did he do when he wore that labcoat?

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Fri Jan 08, 2010 8:09 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: (CI says he served as an auditor for the KatsExp).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 08, 2010 8:12 pm Starasp wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: (CI says he served as an auditor for the KatsExp).

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Fri Jan 08, 2010 8:13 pm Reichu wrote: Starasp wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: (CI says he served as an auditor for the KatsExp).

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jan 08, 2010 8:22 pm If one is in a sterile environment, it only makes sense to have a generic dress code to make it easier to keep adequate supplies ready at all times.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Jan 09, 2010 6:33 am For a simple accountant, Gendo was to much involved with Project E. He probably majored something in natural sciences. Anything else would be below him

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sat Jan 09, 2010 9:50 am Reichu wrote: (CI says he served as an auditor for the KatsExp)

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:32 am ...
